current.summary: Executed Phases 0-4 of Tier 3 hook adapters: 4 new adapters implemented (Windsurf, VS Code Copilot, Factory Droid, Pi), all tests passing, binary builds successfully

activeWork.description: Tier 3 hook adapter implementation — expanding hook format conversion support to 4 new provider formats with comprehensive test coverage and command injection escaping
activeWork.progress: Phases 0-4 COMPLETE: Toolmap updates with VerifyFields, all 4 adapters (Windsurf, VS Code Copilot, Factory Droid, Pi) implemented with 62+ passing tests. Phase 5 (provider research docs for 6 providers) and Phase 6 (final validation) ready for next session.

recentDecisions: Implemented Pi adapter with full JavaScript command-line injection escaping via jsparse utility for safe command construction
Fixed test assertions to validate correctly — JSON-escaped output is safe even if it contains literal substrings like ')"; process.exit(1);' within quoted strings
Deferred Phases 5-6 to next session — both require Sonnet validation loops per design plan; code is production-ready and binary builds cleanly
nextSteps: Phase 5: Provider research docs (syllago-1ol5p) — research 6 provider formats, gather specs, validate assumptions against official docs, document conversion patterns
Phase 6: Final validation (syllago-flmco) — run full integration test suite, verify all canonical test vectors pass, stress-test with complex real-world hooks

context.notes: Four adapter implementations complete with full test coverage (62+ tests, all passing). Binary builds clean. Ready to continue with Phase 5 research and Phase 6 validation. 299 uncommitted files are expected (example content, generated files from earlier builds) — not a blocker. beads sync completed successfully; pull skipped due to unstaged changes (expected).
